profiles.description: Clearly Low risk profile - High revenue stability, strong liquidity, excellent compliance
profiles.use_case: Demo profile showcasing a healthy MSME with strong financial indicators across all dimensions

profiles.description: Clearly High risk profile - Poor revenue stability, weak liquidity, low compliance
profiles.use_case: Demo profile showcasing a struggling MSME with weak financial health indicators

profiles.description: Medium/borderline risk profile - Mixed indicators with decent revenue but poor transaction velocity and declining employment
profiles.use_case: Demo profile showcasing a borderline MSME with some strengths and some weaknesses

profiles.description: Partial data scenario - GST, UPI, AA data available; EPFO adapter simulates failure
profiles.use_case: Demo profile for testing partial adapter failure scenario - EPFO data unavailable, employment_consistency uses default imputation

metadata.created_for: MSME Financial Health Score System - Live Demonstrations
metadata.purpose: These demo profiles are designed for live demonstrations and testing. They represent clear examples of Low/Medium/High risk MSMEs and a partial data scenario.
